scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build && mkdir -p backend/frontend && cp -a frontend/dist backend/frontend/dist && npm --prefix backend install --omit=dev
scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build && mkdir -p backend/frontend && cp -a frontend/dist backend/frontend/dist && npm --prefix backend install --omit=dev
